# Memory Vault — Copilot Instructions

This is a personal knowledge vault (Obsidian + Git). It serves as persistent
memory for GitHub Copilot across all sessions and projects.

## How to Use This Vault

1. Read `AGENTS.md` for full operating instructions
2. Read `index.md` for a map of all knowledge
3. Search `wiki/` before answering questions
4. Write new knowledge proactively during sessions
5. Use `[[wikilinks]]` to connect related concepts
6. Follow the note schema in `AGENTS.md` (YAML frontmatter + wikilinks)

## Available Skills

| Skill | Trigger | Purpose |
|-------|---------|---------|
| session-close | End of session | Summarize session, update wiki, write log |
| curate | On demand | Process inbox, fix links, merge duplicates |
| new-project | On demand | Add a new project memory bank |
| weekly-review | End of week | Review week, surface patterns, plan ahead |
